message:
feat(obligation): VASS/WSTS marking analysis for obligation tracking

Add obligation/marking.rs (1,353 lines) implementing vector-addition
system projection of obligation behavior. Each dimension tracks token
counts per obligation kind within a region, enabling fast trace checks
and bounded coverability-style analyses.

- mod.rs: register marking sub-module.
- leak_check.rs: minor cleanup (4 line reduction).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -63,10 +63,8 @@ impl VarState {
             (Self::MayHold(k1), Self::MayHold(k2)) if k1 == k2 => Self::MayHold(k1),
 
             // Held in one path, not in another => MayHold.
-            (Self::Held(k), Self::Resolved)
-            | (Self::Resolved, Self::Held(k))
-            | (Self::Held(k), Self::Empty)
-            | (Self::Empty, Self::Held(k)) => Self::MayHold(k),
+            (Self::Held(k), Self::Resolved | Self::Empty)
+            | (Self::Resolved | Self::Empty, Self::Held(k)) => Self::MayHold(k),
 
             // MayHold propagates.
             (Self::MayHold(k), _) | (_, Self::MayHold(k)) => Self::MayHold(k),
